section.heading: Sense of Congress
section.chapeau: It is the sense of Congress that—

paragraph.content: the older American community service employment program described in this subchapter was established with the intent of placing older individuals in community service positions and providing job training; and

placing older individuals in community service positions strengthens the ability of the individuals to become self-sufficient, provides much-needed support to organizations that benefit from increased civic engagement, and strengthens the communities that are served by such organizations.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 89–73, title V, § 516, as added Pub. L. 109–365, title V, § 501, Oct. 17, 2006, 120 Stat. 2587.)

note.heading: Prior Provisions
note.p: A prior section 3056n, Pub. L. 89–73, title V, § 516, as added Pub. L. 106–501, title V, § 501, Nov. 13, 2000, 114 Stat. 2287, related to definitions, prior to the general amendment of this subchapter by Pub. L. 109–365. See section 3056p(a) of this title.
